evidence: Fusion v2 contains every RQ01 required column.
Rows without event-scale current must retain null current values, not zero-filled values.
Primary wave-only Tier A lane must be non-empty.
Primary wave + wind-speed Tier A lane must be non-empty.
Current-aware lanes are available but remain NWS-domain / coverage-limited sensitivity only.
Lane feature columns do not include wind-direction fields.
Current-aware lanes are explicitly labelled restricted sensitivity.
RQ01 inherits the Fusion v2 evidence-readiness restricted recommendation and caveats.
RQ01 emits depth-warning exclusion and sensitivity subsets.
Outputs are observed-envelope descriptive sensitivity only, not P(operation | weather).
